content.en:
The second attempt, like the first, ended in failure, and the replica body still collapsed directly.

However, the second attempt to refine took longer than the first time, and it allowed Ye Tian to find a trace of understanding and regularity, and also gave him a little understanding of the power of the dark taboo.

Strictly speaking, the power of the dark forbidden is also a kind of origin power, but it is the most primitive origin power, incomparably violent and powerful, and the origin power of the Chaos Avenue in the realm seems to be a weakened version, and the powerful forbidden power is removed, leaving only the origin.

It can be said that the power of the dark forbidden is the true primordial and purest power, but it is also the most difficult to master.

Seeing that Ye Tian's second attempt failed, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor was not disappointed, but had some expectations.

After all, he could also see that Ye Tian's second attempt was better than the first, and if he continued to try, he might really be able to master the power of the dark taboo.

What's more, there is no danger in Ye Tian doing this.

"Apprentice, for the teacher, I will speed you up 100,000 times more, so that you can recover as soon as possible!"

Void Heaven Dao Ancestor hurriedly said.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded in response.

Under the acceleration of 100,000 times time, Ye Tian spent 10,000 years, and his ability to copy his body could be used again.

In this way, Ye Tian tried again and again.

Five times!

Ten times!

Every attempt allowed Ye Tian to accumulate more experience and have more insights.

In the twelfth attempt, Ye Tian's body continued to absorb and refine the power of the dark taboo, and it has always remained in a stable state.

After a full month, Ye Tian finally succeeded in refining a trace of dark forbidden power, although his body was seriously eroded, he successfully refined a trace of dark forbidden power.

It's a successful start!

Immediately, he used this trace of dark forbidden power to begin to merge with his physical body, refining his own body, and absorbing the remaining dark forbidden power within his body.

In this way, Ye Tian's body began to recover, and the power of the dark forbidden power refined was traced one after another.

A long time passed, and Ye Tiancai finally mastered the power of the Dark Taboo.

At this time, he can already use the power of the dark taboo to refine his body, increase the strength of the physical body, and even affect his divine power, slowly giving the divine power a certain characteristic, once promoted to the true ancestor level, the divine power will immediately transform into the power of the dark forbidden true ancestor.

"It worked!"

Ye Tian and the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor were very happy.

However, Ye Tian didn't let the ontology directly come to the experiment, after all, it was only a success, and it was not perfect, although he had mastered the power of the dark taboo, but the foundation was affected.

Therefore, Ye Tian had to try many times, and while ensuring the success rate, he also had to ensure the integrity of the foundation, and strive to perfectly control the power of the dark taboo.

Subsequently, Ye Tian conducted many more experiments, almost every time he succeeded, and he perfectly controlled the power of the dark forbidden with almost no injuries later.

"Disciple, it's okay, let your body try to refine the power of the dark forbidden and completely control him!" the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor urged.

Ye Tian nodded, and the main body flew up to the black lotus, swallowed a lotus seed, and began to refine the power of the dark taboo.

Time passed slowly, and in just three days, Ye Tian had mastered a trace of the power of the dark taboo, and a month later, he had perfectly mastered the power of the dark taboo and began to refine his physical body.

Originally, his physical body had reached a limit, but under the tempering of the dark forbidden power, the strength of his physical body began to increase again, and the increase was not slow.

"Apprentice, you cultivate for a while longer, and then try to see if you can refine that black lotus into your body, this is a source of dark forbidden power, if you can refine it, you can also cultivate the dark forbidden power in the quasi-Dao realm in the future, which will be of great help to you in condensing the forbidden body in the future!"

Void Heaven Dao Ancestor reminded.

"Master, I'll try!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

He tried to refine the Black Lotus at first, but the power of the Dark Forbidden Power he mastered was too little, and it was difficult to refine the Black Lotus.

As a result, Ye Tian continued to cultivate, mastering more and more of the power of the dark taboo.

Ten years have passed, and Ye Tian has been able to initially refine the Black Lotus, and this refining has passed a full hundred years.

this day.

Bang!!!!

The Dark Forbidden Lake shook, and the Forbidden Black Lotus slowly broke away from the Forbidden Lake and was refined by Ye Tian into the body.

Subsequently, Ye Tian urged the Forbidden Black Lotus to swallow the countless dark forbidden lake water.

After a long time, the forbidden black lotus was swallowed.

"I don't know how long it will take for a forbidden black lotus to be born here again!" Ye Tian sighed.

The power of the dark forbidden has been controlled, and Ye Tian will no longer stay here for long.

Under the escort of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, Ye Tian left the Dark Forbidden Realm and returned to the Quasi-Dao Realm.

During this period, it did not arouse the suspicion of any of the forces.

--------------

Quasi-Dao Realm, Terran territory.

After Ye Tian came back, he studied the power of the dark taboo.

However, at the moment, the power of the Dark Forbidden is not very helpful to him, because it is too little, it does damage to the enemy, but the injury is not so great.

Of course, if it is mixed with some dark forbidden power under the attack, it can also increase the combat power to a certain extent.

But Ye Tian's strongest method at present is the Dao Technique, and the power of the Dark Forbidden cannot be fused with the Dao Technique, so naturally there is no way to greatly increase the combat power.

For Ye Tian, only after he advanced to the True Ancestor could the effect of the Dark Forbidden Power be brought into full play, and his strength would skyrocket a lot.

Right now, his task is to raise his cultivation to the half-step True Ancestor limit, and then cultivate a sect technique to the perfection or even the limit level.

As the years passed, the changes in the quasi-path world became greater and greater.

For example, at the level of the god general, there will be more and more ten-star gods, and the inheritance of relics in the domain realm will continue to appear, and the entire cultivation system has undergone tremendous changes, coupled with the abundant resources, it is not impossible to impact the ten-star god generals.

Therefore, in such a situation, the non-ten-star gods will not be able to worship under the Dao Ancestor Sect at all.

As for the nine-star god generals, there are too many, and the nine-star god generals who were known as peerless in the past have now become ordinary.

And these nine-star gods and ten-star gods will become heavenly monarchs and true monarchs one after another, crushing those older generation true monarchs one after another.

It can be said that the entire quasi-path world is ushering in a new reshuffle.

Those veteran half-step true ancestors were defeated by the new half-step true ancestors one after another, and half-step true ancestors like Longhai True Monarch who were as strong as Longhai True Monarch were gradually chased by some late-stage stars of the Void Heaven Palace, and even a few people surpassed Longhai True Monarch.

But there is one person in the dimension, and no one dares to provoke, and that is Ye Tian.

There was once a half-step true ancestor who tried to provoke Ye Tian, but was killed by Ye Tian's finger in the air, which shocked countless half-step true ancestors, and no one dared to challenge Ye Tian casually.

In a flash, thousands of years have passed.

"The soul and the Great Dao have fused to the limit, and they can attack the True Ancestor at any time. He has cultivated more than a dozen Dao techniques, and each Dao technique has reached the limit level. "

Ye Tian muttered.

But his greatest progress is the mastery of the power of the dark taboo, and now he has made his body extremely powerful, and the power of the dark taboo under his control can almost be attacked outward.

If the power of the dark forbidden form a spear, it is enough to match the blow of the Dao Technique.

But at Ye Tian's level, it was difficult for the power of the dark forbidden to grow, and he had to advance to the True Ancestor level before he could progress again.

It can be said that Ye Tian has grown to the limit at the half-step True Ancestor level, and the only way to improve again is to promote the half-step True Ancestor.

Many half-step True Ancestors are also in this state.

But if the Dao Realm is not promoted to the Dao Realm for a day, others will not dare to casually impact the True Ancestor Realm, otherwise there will be great defects, and there will even be a risk of falling.

After waiting for hundreds of thousands of years, the quasi-Dao world has finally ushered in a huge change!
